## WHAT I OBSERVED AFTER TESTING THE APP ON MY DEVICE (ITEl A80)
-the icon (is capacitor's default icon)
- and I noticed that for the splash screen it uses capacitor's default splash screen and then app's default splash screen. they're supposed to be one!
-The notifications reoccurs too often everytime the app is opened or closeed and the notification permission is granted. Not just that the "low balance alert" notification is always showing even when the projected balance will not drop below what is set before predicted date(payday). Meaning that regardless of the user the notification will always show whenever the app please opened or closed.

- there is no dark mode. I want you to follow the system mode (light or dark).
- I noticed that the privacy lock is not suggested to new users
- I like to have the uniformity of set up color and the status bar at the top of the device to always display the app's primary color. 
- another thing that makes the app feels less cool is that when a text field is selected the orange-like outline around the text field doesn't look cool, it's not supposed to be like that!
